'''Ixidro Legorburu''' was a male from [[M'haeli/Legends|M'haeli]]. He was once a member of [[New Republic Intelligence Service]], and had been a tactical aide during the [[Black Fleet Crisis]]. By [[25 ABY/Legends|25 ABY]] he held the rank of [[Colonel/Legends|colonel]] and was the director of the [[Home Fleet's Battle Assessment Division]]. Six months after the start of the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]] he briefed the leaders of the [[New Republic Defense Force/Legends|New Republic Defense Force]] on the threat of the [[Yuuzhan Vong]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos I: Hero's Trial]]''
*''[[The New Jedi Order: Agents of Chaos II: Jedi Eclipse]]''
